summary: Made two surgical seam edits: diversified the opening construction so it no longer mirrors the adjacent visible chapter-opening scaffold, and tightened the closing handoff so Dell's late return with damp earth on his hands feeds cleanly into Chapter 7.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin on Dell's half-mended harness trace and watchfulness rather than a similar pluperfect character-state opening.
Adjusted the final sentence to establish that Dell came home after dark with damp earth still on his hands, matching the next chapter's carryover detail.
